task_completion.description: The agent selected the SampleMACrossOver strategy in the Strategy Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer window is open with 'SampleMACrossOver' selected in the strategy dropdown or settings pane.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the backtest for SPY using Daily bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Strategy Analyzer settings, the instrument is set to 'SPY' and the Data Series Type/Value is set to 'Day' or 'Daily'.

task_completion.description: The agent set the backtest date range from January 2023 to December 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Date is set to a date in early January 2023 (e.g., 1/3/2023) and the End Date is set to a date in late December 2024 (e.g., 12/31/2024) in the Strategy Analyzer parameters.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully ran the backtest and generated results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer shows a performance summary, chart, or execution list indicating the backtest has completed.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the trades/executions list to prepare for export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Executions' or 'Trades' tab is active in the Strategy Analyzer, showing a data grid of historical trades.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the trades list to the specified CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible with the file name 'spy_backtest_trades.csv' and the path pointing to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks', or a confirmation message of the successful export is shown.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader GUI to configure and run the backtest.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the NinjaTrader Strategy Analyzer interface, not just a terminal or script running in the background.

integrity.description: The agent exported the data from the NinjaTrader application rather than manually creating a fake CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog originates from the NinjaTrader application (e.g., right-clicking the grid and selecting Export), rather than opening Notepad or Excel to type out fake trades.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a python/powershell script to bypass the NinjaTrader UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open executing scripts to generate the CSV file directly from raw data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The backtest must use the 'SampleMACrossOver' strategy on the 'SPY' instrument with 'Daily' bars. The exact date range to look for in the settings is Start Date: 2023-01-03 and End Date: 2024-12-31. The final output must be exported exactly to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\spy_backtest_trades.csv'.
